Home / Service Areas / Hales Corners

Auto-body in Hales Corners, WI

Trusted local professionals serving Hales Corners and surrounding communities

Serving Hales Corners, WI

Summit Auto Body provides top-tier auto-body services to Hales Corners, WI, a small village with a close-knit community. Hales Corners' tree-lined streets and historic homes mean vehicles here often face tight parking and narrow roads. Our team excels in repairing scratches, dents, and collision damage, ensuring your car looks its best. The area's harsh winters bring heavy snow and ice, leading to potential undercarriage damage. We offer rust prevention and repair services to protect your investment.

Hales Corners is a quiet, residential village with a strong community focus and historic landmarks.

Auto-body Services in Hales Corners

Collision Repair

Complete restoration after accidents, from fender benders to major impacts.

Learn more →

Paintless Dent Repair

Affordable hail damage and dent removal without repainting.

Learn more →

Rust Repair

Stop Wisconsin salt damage before it spreads.

Learn more →

Frame Straightening

Precision correction for Milwaukee's worst crashes.

Learn more →

Bumper Repair

Affordable fixes for parking lot scrapes and winter bumps.

Learn more →

Need Auto-body in Hales Corners?

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout Hales Corners and the surrounding area.
